class.name: PiperTTS
class.brief_description: VITS neural TTS engine for Godot.
class.description:
Integrates the piper-plus VITS neural text-to-speech engine into Godot as a node. Synthesizes speech audio from Japanese text using ONNX Runtime for inference and OpenJTalk for grapheme-to-phoneme conversion. Set [member model_path], [member config_path], and [member dictionary_path], then call [method initialize] before synthesizing speech. Use [method synthesize] for synchronous synthesis or [method synthesize_async] for non-blocking synthesis on a worker thread. Set [member execution_provider] to use GPU acceleration on supported platforms (CoreML on macOS/iOS, DirectML on Windows, NNAPI on Android). [codeblocks] [gdscript] # Basic usage example var tts = PiperTTS.new() tts.model_path = "res://addons/piper_plus/models/ja_JP-test-medium/ja_JP-test-medium.onnx" tts.config_path = "res://addons/piper_plus/models/ja_JP-test-medium/ja_JP-test-medium.onnx.json" tts.execution_provider = PiperTTS.EP_AUTO add_child(tts) tts.initialize()
# Async synthesis tts.synthesis_completed.connect(func(audio): $AudioStreamPlayer.stream = audio; $AudioStreamPlayer.play()) tts.synthesize_async("こんにちは、世界！") [/gdscript] [/codeblocks]

method.name: initialize
method.description: Loads the ONNX model, model configuration, and OpenJTalk dictionary, then initializes the TTS engine. [member model_path], [member config_path], and [member dictionary_path] must be set before calling this method. Returns [constant OK] on success, or an error code on failure. The [signal initialized] signal is also emitted when initialization completes.

method.name: synthesize
method.description: Synthesizes speech from the given text synchronously and returns the resulting audio as an [AudioStreamWAV] (22050 Hz, 16-bit PCM). This method blocks the calling thread until synthesis is complete. Returns [code]null[/code] if the engine has not been initialized. Call [method initialize] first.

method.name: synthesize_async
method.description: Synthesizes speech from the given text asynchronously on a worker thread. This method does not block the main thread. On success, the [signal synthesis_completed] signal is emitted with the resulting [AudioStreamWAV]. On failure, the [signal synthesis_failed] signal is emitted with an error message. Returns [constant OK] if the synthesis task was started, or [constant ERR_BUSY] if a synthesis is already in progress.

method.name: stop
method.description: Cancels the currently running asynchronous synthesis started by [method synthesize_async] or streaming synthesis started by [method synthesize_streaming]. Does nothing if no synthesis is in progress.

method.name: is_ready
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the TTS engine has been successfully initialized and is ready to synthesize speech.

method.name: is_processing
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if an asynchronous synthesis started by [method synthesize_async] is currently in progress.

method.name: synthesize_streaming
method.description: Synthesizes speech from the given text using streaming mode. Audio chunks are pushed to the provided [param playback] as each sentence is synthesized, significantly reducing time-to-first-audio for long texts. The [param playback] must be obtained from an [AudioStreamPlayer] whose stream is set to an [AudioStreamGenerator] with [code]mix_rate = 22050[/code] and [code]buffer_length = 0.5[/code] (or larger). Call [method AudioStreamPlayer.play] before calling this method. When all audio has been pushed to the playback, the [signal streaming_ended] signal is emitted. On failure, the [signal synthesis_failed] signal is emitted. Returns [constant OK] if streaming synthesis was started, or [constant ERR_BUSY] if a synthesis is already in progress.

members.member: Path to the ONNX model file ([code].onnx[/code]). Supports Godot resource paths (e.g., [code]res://addons/piper_plus/models/ja_JP-test-medium.onnx[/code]).
Path to the model configuration file ([code].onnx.json[/code]). This file contains phoneme mappings, sample rate, and other model-specific settings.

Path to the OpenJTalk dictionary directory (naist-jdic). Required for Japanese TTS. Supports Godot resource paths such as [code]res://[/code] and [code]user://[/code] (e.g., [code]res://addons/piper_plus/dictionaries/naist-jdic[/code]). When set, this path is applied as the OpenJTalk dictionary path during [method initialize].
Speaker ID for multi-speaker models. Valid range is 0 to 999. Ignored for single-speaker models.

Speech rate multiplier corresponding to the VITS [code]lengthScale[/code] parameter. A value of [code]1.0[/code] is the default speed. Smaller values produce faster speech, and larger values produce slower speech.
Controls the randomness of the generated speech. A value of [code]0.0[/code] produces the most stable output. Higher values introduce more variation in pitch and tone.
Controls the randomness of phoneme durations. A value of [code]0.0[/code] produces the most uniform timing. Higher values introduce more variation in the duration of individual phonemes.

Execution provider for ONNX Runtime inference. Set this before calling [method initialize]. [b]CPU[/b] (0): Default CPU execution. Works on all platforms. [b]CoreML[/b] (1): Apple Neural Engine / GPU acceleration. Available on macOS and iOS. [b]DirectML[/b] (2): DirectX GPU acceleration. Available on Windows when built with DirectML-enabled ONNX Runtime. [b]NNAPI[/b] (3): Android Neural Networks API acceleration. Available on Android. [b]Auto[/b] (4): Automatically selects the best available execution provider for the current platform (macOS/iOS → CoreML, Windows → DirectML if available, Android → NNAPI, Linux → CPU). If the selected GPU execution provider is unavailable or fails, the engine automatically falls back to CPU.

signal.name: initialized
signal.description: Emitted when [method initialize] completes. [param success] is [code]true[/code] if initialization succeeded, or [code]false[/code] if it failed.

signal.name: synthesis_completed
signal.description: Emitted when [method synthesize_async] finishes successfully. [param audio] contains the synthesized speech as an [AudioStreamWAV] (22050 Hz, 16-bit PCM). This signal is emitted on the main thread and is safe to use for updating the scene.

signal.name: synthesis_failed
signal.description: Emitted when [method synthesize_async] or [method synthesize_streaming] fails. [param error] contains a human-readable error message describing the cause of the failure.

signal.name: streaming_ended
signal.description: Emitted when [method synthesize_streaming] has finished pushing all audio chunks to the playback buffer. This signal is emitted on the main thread.

constants.constant: CPU execution provider. Default, works on all platforms.
CoreML execution provider for macOS and iOS. Uses Apple Neural Engine and GPU when available.
DirectML execution provider for Windows. Uses DirectX GPU acceleration.
NNAPI execution provider for Android. Uses Android Neural Networks API.
Automatically selects the best available execution provider for the current platform.
